svg.text: training only: predict_x0(z_t, eps_pred, t) → VAE decode → VGG perceptual term (optional)
linear warm-up → cosine decay → lr_min=1e-6 · accumulate_grads=2
L_simple = MSE(eps_pred, eps) · no discriminator · no cycle loss · no adversarial training
optional: VGG19 perceptual on decoded z0_pred vs real_B (lambda_perc=0.0 default)
cosine beta-schedule T=1000 · DDIM 50-step inference · EMA 0.9999 · VAE frozen · ConditionEncoder separate
